summary: Position an element absolute to a side of the ancestor stacking context.

modifiers.side: top-left, top, top-right, roght, bottom-right, bottom, bottom-left, left

description.side: Sets element absolutely positioned to a specified side

summary: Position an element fixed to a side of the view.

modifiers.side: top, top-left, top-right, bottom, bottom-left, bottom-right, left, right

description.side: Sets element fixed to a specified side

summary: Sets the position of an element.

description.type: Selects what type of position to apply to element

summary: Positions element on the side of the view but only after user has scrolled past the element.

description.side: Stickies the element to the specified side.
